case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS. SHREVE & CO. JEWELERS, LTD ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-01-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT SHREVE & CO. JEWELERS, LTD CRANE CONSTRUCTION FEDERAL REALTY INVESTMENT TRUST REALTY INVESTMENT TRUST RAREFORM DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-10-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-06-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-17-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-10-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100019276)
